# Pull Request

## 📝 Title

`type(LINEAR-KEY): brief description` (types: feat | fix | docs | chore | refactor | style)

Example: `docs(BBG-42): add Codex workflow instructions`

## 🎯 Summary

- [ ] What changed
- [ ] Why it matters

## 📋 Changes

- [ ] Key change 1
- [ ] Key change 2

## 🌿 Branch

- Note: use uppercase Linear keys in PR text (`BBG-42`) and lowercase Linear keys in branch names (`bbg-42-short-title`).
- [ ] Source branch follows Linear naming, e.g. `bbg-42-short-title`, or uses an accepted Codex Cloud-managed branch containing the lowercase Linear key
- [ ] Target branch is `preview`

## 🎯 Scope

- [ ] PR is scoped to the Linear issue
- [ ] No unrelated app, deployment, CI, dependency, or environment changes

## 🧪 Testing

- [ ] `pnpm run check`
- [ ] `pnpm run build:ci` if build, CI, or deploy behavior may be affected
- [ ] Manual checks: add 2-3 steps specific to this PR

## 🖼️ Screenshots / Recordings

- Not applicable

## 🔗 Linear

- Issue: LINEAR-KEY
- Closes LINEAR-KEY

Example: `Closes BBG-42`

## ✅ Ready

- [ ] Ready for review
- [ ] No breaking changes
